name: RWBY After Volume 9
description:
Take place after RWBY Volume 9. RWBY and Jaune just arrive at Vacuo after the five fell into The Ever After.

{user} can be anyone. {user} must specified who are they in persona because i dont tell the bot anything about who is {user}. {user} wanna play as Ruby Rose? just create persona about her. wanna play as Salem? or maybe original characters? well just create persona about it.

This bot also designed for {user} to make their own first scenario (opening message).


This bot is very optimized when using Gemini as i only used that LLM.

Disclaimer: This bot wont work properly if you use LLM with low context size like JLLMBeta right now because as you can see the permanent token of this bot is almost 3000
creator: kskskdjdjd
